disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Red patches with greasy yellow scales over the central face, worst in the folds beside the nose and on the eyebrows
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what the rash looks like?
What colour is it and are there any flakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's red and covered in greasy yellowish flakes, worst in the creases beside my nose and on my eyebrows.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distribution is symmetrical across both sides of the face and involves the anterior scalp margin
trigger_question_examples: Is it on both sides of your face or just one?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's on both sides evenly, and my scalp is shedding flakes at the hairline.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy scalp flaking / dandruff accompanies the facial rash
trigger_question_examples: Any dandruff or flaking from your scalp?
Is your scalp itchy or shedding flakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, tonnes of dandruff, my scalp won't stop flaking.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The rash follows a chronic, relapsing course with intermittent milder episodes over years
trigger_question_examples: Have you had anything like this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get flaky greasy patches from time to time, but never blown up like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Flare followed a period of extreme work stress and a sudden drop to cold, dry weather
trigger_question_examples: Was anything going on when it flared — stress, weather, new products?
Has it been especially stressful or cold and dry lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Work has been unbelievably stressful and it turned cold and dry — that's when it exploded.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Aggressive scrubbing with harsh alkaline soap to remove the flakes has worsened the redness
trigger_question_examples: What have you been putting on it or doing to it?
How have you been washing your face?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been scrubbing hard with strong soap to get the flakes off — it feels like that's made the redness worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no chills, and the affected skin is not described as hot, deeply painful or spreading over one cheek
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any fever or chills?
Is any area hot, very tender, or rapidly spreading on one side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or chills, and it's not hot or agonising — it's more burning and itchy, and it's even on both sides.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No joint pain, no mouth ulcers, no unusual sun sensitivity, and no new facial cosmetics introduced
trigger_question_examples: Any joint pains, mouth ulcers, or sensitivity to sunlight?
Have you started any new makeup, creams or skincare?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No joint pain, no mouth ulcers, nothing new on my skin, and sunlight doesn't seem to bother me.
